response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal cloud platform leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments, which are core to the role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in open-source engineering and technical mentorship
Broad full-stack expertise across TypeScript, cloud-native tools, and distributed systems
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in production
Lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on AI-driven enterprise solutions
Limited documentation of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
